evidence_direction_note: RECLASSIFIED 2026-04-11 governance. SD-020: mixed (not does_not_support). 1/5 seeds pass. Two compounding confounds prevent clean signal: (1) n_steps=10-20 harm events per seed -- too few for stable correlation; sign-flipping across seeds is noise, not a real effect. (2) harm_obs_a_variance=0.0003-0.0007 (EMA substrate) -- z_harm_a has too little variance to encode PE signal. Both confounds are substrate issues, not mechanism failures. Prediction: re-run on SD-022 substrate (limb_damage_enabled=True) with >= 100 harm events per seed to obtain interpretable signal. SD-011: reclassified non_contributory -- this tests SD-020 training target choice, not the dual-stream architecture claim. Q-036: reclassified non_contributory -- question remains open; this test was insufficiently powered (n=10-20 events) to answer whether PE is necessary beyond temporal integration.
